description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: captcha-server-deploy, mvn-package, and deploy. Add a captcha-server-deploy job in the captcha-server-deploy stage that runs `bash captcha-server-deploy.sh`. Add a package job in the mvn-package stage that runs `mvn --settings ./settings.xml clean package -U -DskipTests=false`. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that runs `bash deploy.sh`. Configure a cache that preserves the `target/` directory across jobs.
